title: Dense Peppery Saudi-Arabian Danmuji Hash
description: A spicy and aromatic dish that brings together the crunch of danmuji and the warmth of Saudi-Arabian spices.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons of saffron threads
ingredients.notes: soaked in 2 tablespoons of hot water

ingredients.name: 1 pound of beef or lamb, finely chopped

instructions: Heat the oil in a large wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chopped beef or lamb and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the cumin powder, coriander powder, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the soaked saffron and its liquid to the wok. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the danmuji to the wok and stir to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with additional saffron threads if desired.
